title: botrychium australe var. millefolium
intro: Botrychium australe var. millefolium, also known as the Australian grape fern, is a rare and unique type of fern that is native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving circulation, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Botrychium australe var. millefolium is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
